visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A young woman wearing a black beret and a white puffer vest stands in front of a shelf filled with Disney and Marvel themed blanket sets. She smiles broadly at the camera, gesturing with her hands while a large Costco logo is overlaid at the top of the frame. (2) The camera moves closer to the merchandise on the shelf, focusing on Winnie the Pooh, Spiderman, and Stitch pillow/blanket sets. The woman points to each character, her facial expressions showing high excitement. The lighting is uniform and bright throughout the store aisle. (3) The woman picks up a Winnie the Pooh set, holding the plush pillow close to the lens. She turns it over to show the packaging details and the 'Nogginz' brand label. Her movements are quick and energetic. (4) She demonstrates the size of the blanket by pulling part of it out, then points upwards towards a price sign hanging from the shelf above. Various other products and the industrial ceiling of the warehouse are visible in the background. (5) The woman holds the Pooh pillow against her cheek, making a cute face. She gives a thumbs-up to the camera as the video concludes, surrounded by the colorful product displays.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco Wholesale. [Subtitle]: 新生兒送這個超棒的. (2) [Subtitle]: 雙面毯毯加小枕頭. (3) [Subtitle]: 還有維尼的臉臉. (4) [Subtitle]: 蜘蛛人. (5) [Subtitle]: 還有史迪奇. (6) [Subtitle]: 最重要是臉做的好好看哦. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後這個大毯毯啊. (8) [Subtitle]: 你可以正反面都蓋. (9) [Subtitle]: 因為他是雙面圖案. (10) [Variety]: 好可愛哦. (11) [Subtitle]: 維尼來一個. (12) [Subtitle]: 你看這裡有人把他剝開. (13) [Subtitle]: 所以你就可以當一個小抱枕. (14) [Subtitle]: 因為他size很小. (15) [Subtitle]: 只適合小頭. (16) [Variety]: kawaii. (17) [Subtitle]: 像你頭太大就不能用. (18) [Subtitle]: 539元可以放車上. (19) [Subtitle]: 152*177公分哦. (20) [Subtitle]: 你蓋不了太小件了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator presenting products in the foreground.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman wearing a black Kangol beret, a white puffer vest over a blue long-sleeve shirt, and a small tan crossbody bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with industrial shelving, merchandise, price signs, and overhead fluorescent lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins speaking immediately over a bright and bouncy acoustic BGM bed. The speech rate is fast and energetic, conveying excitement about the shopping find. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect punctuates the mention of a new product feature. The female's voice rises in pitch at the end of several short phrases, indicating a persuasive and friendly tone. (3) Soft rustling noises are heard as pillows are handled. An off-camera male voice contributes a short, casual remark in a lower pitch, creating a brief dialogue interaction. (4) A 'pop' sound effect occurs as technical information is revealed. The background music remains consistent in its upbeat tempo and major-key tonality throughout the recording. (5) The primary female speaker raises her volume and intensity to conclude the segment with a final energetic recommendation. The audio track cuts off cleanly as she finishes her sentence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Price Reveal -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: An energetic shopping vlog showcasing a specific character-themed blanket and pillow set found at Costco. The creator highlights features like the double-sided design and character variety (Winnie the Pooh, Spiderman, Stitch) to recommend the item as a gift for babies or for use in a car.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video follows an organic shopping vlog format without explicit promotional disclosures.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced social media short using typical high-arousal delivery and colorful overlays to engage viewers in product discovery.
